description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:14 Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm install, caches the node_modules/ directory, and publishes node_modules/ as an artifact that expires after one week, with tags docker and shared. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm test and a validate job that runs npm run validate, both using node:14 and the same docker and shared tags. Configure a global cache for node_modules/ so all jobs share the installed dependencies. No additional services or deployment targets are required.
